name: @cubis/foundry
description: Cubis Foundry CLI for workflow-first AI agent environments

scripts.test:attributes: node scripts/validate-platform-attributes.mjs && node scripts/validate-shared-routing.mjs && node scripts/validate-skill-packaging.mjs && node scripts/validate-runtime-wiring.mjs && node scripts/generate-skills-index.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-skill-catalog.mjs --check
scripts.test:attributes:strict: node scripts/validate-platform-attributes.mjs --strict && node scripts/validate-shared-routing.mjs && node scripts/validate-skill-packaging.mjs && node scripts/validate-runtime-wiring.mjs && node scripts/generate-skills-index.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-skill-catalog.mjs --check
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build:cli && node scripts/run-bash-script.mjs scripts/smoke-workflows.sh
scripts.test:init:tty: npm run build:cli && node scripts/run-init-tty-test.mjs bin/cubis.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:attributes && npm run test:cli-help && npm run test:build-architecture && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:all:strict: npm run test:attributes:strict && npm run test:cli-help && npm run test:build-architecture && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:ci: npm run check:generated-assets && npm run test:all
scripts.check:generated-assets: npm run check:platform-assets && npm run check:skill-mirrors && npm run validate:mcp-manifest && npm run check:mcp-rules:all
scripts.inject:mcp-rules:all: npm run inject:mcp-rules:codex && npm run inject:mcp-rules:antigravity && npm run inject:mcp-rules:gemini && npm run inject:mcp-rules:copilot && npm run inject:mcp-rules:claude
scripts.check:mcp-rules:all: npm run check:mcp-rules:codex && npm run check:mcp-rules:antigravity && npm run check:mcp-rules:gemini && npm run check:mcp-rules:copilot && npm run check:mcp-rules:claude
scripts.generate:all: npm run generate:platform-assets && npm run sync:skill-mirrors && npm run generate:skills-index && npm run generate:skill-catalog && npm run generate:mcp-manifest && npm run inject:mcp-rules:all
scripts.prepack: npm run build:cli && npm run check:skills-index && npm run check:skill-catalog
